(q) “manager” means any person or entity who is appointed by the Alternative
Investment Fund to manage its investments by whatever name called and may also
be same as the sponsor of the Fund;
18[(qa) “not for profit organization” shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in
clause (e) of regulation 292A of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue
of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018;]
heading: Section 4 of the Companies Act, 1956;”.
